case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. GUILLERMO DURAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
